sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Guggenheim Capital LLC Grows Stock Position in QUALCOMM Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Guggenheim Capital LLC increased its stake in QUALCOMM Incorporated by 6.6% in the second quarter, bringing its total holdings to 833,146 shares valued at approximately $132.7 million. This makes QUALCOMM the fund's 11th-largest holding and represents about 0.08% of the company. The wireless technology firm has exceeded quarterly estimates with strong revenue growth and positive Q1 2026 guidance, leading to analysts raising price targets and maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Palantir Launches ‘Chain Reaction’ In Partnership With Nvidia, CenterPoint Energy To Tackle AI’s Biggest Bottleneck – The Energy Grid
feed.summary: Palantir (PLTR) has introduced "Chain Reaction," a new software platform designed to manage and expand U.S. artificial intelligence infrastructure, addressing the critical bottleneck of power access and high-performance computing hardware. The company is partnering with CenterPoint Energy (CNP) and Nvidia (NVDA) to coordinate energy utilities, grid operators, and data-center builders for faster expansion. Palantir views the energy grid as the primary constraint on AI innovation, not model development.

feed.title: Guggenheim Capital LLC Purchases 14,480 Shares of Intuit Inc. $INTU
feed.summary: Guggenheim Capital LLC has increased its stake in Intuit Inc. by 26.7%, adding 14,480 shares to now hold 68,730 shares valued at approximately $54.13 million. This comes as Intuit recently beat quarterly earnings estimates, with revenue up 18.3%, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.20 per share. Other large institutions like Norges Bank and Nuveen have also significantly invested in Intuit, while company insiders have sold a portion of their holdings.

feed.title: Is O'Reilly Automotive Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) stock is underperforming the Nasdaq, highlighting its recent price performance and contrasting it with the broader market. It also touches upon ORLY's strong financial health and growth prospects, which could appeal to investors seeking stability.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company $DIS Stock Position Lifted by CW Advisors LLC
feed.summary: CW Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company (DIS) during the second quarter, acquiring an additional 62,904 shares to bring its total holdings to 156,726 shares valued at $19.44 million. Analysts currently rate Disney as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $134.41. The company recently beat Q2 earnings estimates but fell slightly short on revenue, and its stock is currently trading near $105.72.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource, Inc. $BLDR Shares Sold by Fisher Asset Management LLC
feed.summary: Fisher Asset Management LLC reduced its stake in Builders FirstSource, Inc. by 22.2% during the second quarter, selling over 41,000 shares. Despite this, several other hedge funds increased their positions in BLDR. Analysts currently rate Builders FirstSource as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $136.92.

feed.title: CW Advisors LLC Reduces Stock Position in Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: CW Advisors LLC has reduced its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. by 6.7% in the second quarter, selling 19,741 shares, but still holds 274,803 shares valued at approximately $21.75 million. Other hedge funds have either increased or decreased their positions in MRK, with institutional investors now owning 76.07% of the stock. Merck recently reported earnings that beat analyst expectations, provided Q4 guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Edgestream Partners L.P. Trims Stake in Dollar Tree, Inc. $DLTR
feed.summary: Edgestream Partners L.P. significantly reduced its stake in Dollar Tree, Inc. by 24.3% in the second quarter, selling 10,376 shares and retaining holdings worth $3.203 million. Other institutional investors like LBP AM SA and IFM Investors Pty Ltd increased their positions in DLTR, while some analysts have issued varied ratings, with the consensus being a "Hold" and a target price of $109.79. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has seen recent insider stock sales.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. $WSM Holdings Raised by Fisher Asset Management LLC
feed.summary: Fisher Asset Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE:WSM) by 1,172.4% during Q2, now holding 56,267 shares valued at $9,192,000. Other hedge funds like Edgestream Partners L.P. and institutional investors have also adjusted their positions, with institutional ownership reaching 99.29%. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.66 and exceeded analyst estimates for its last quarterly earnings.

feed.title: Palantir Launches Chain Reaction to Build American AI Infrastructure; Founding Partners Include CenterPoint Energy and NVIDIA
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. launched Chain Reaction, an operating system for American AI infrastructure, aiming to address the bottlenecks in AI innovation related to power and compute. Founding partners include CenterPoint Energy and NVIDIA, who will collaborate to transform aging power generation, stabilize the grid, and accelerate the construction of new capacity for hyperscale data centers supporting AI workloads. This initiative seeks to integrate technology and energy to meet the surging demand for AI infrastructure in the U.S.

feed.title: Palantir Launches Chain Reaction to Build American AI Infrastructure; Founding Partners Include CenterPoint Energy and NVIDIA
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. has launched "Chain Reaction," an operating system designed to accelerate the buildout of American AI infrastructure by tackling power and compute bottlenecks. The initiative, partnering with CenterPoint Energy and NVIDIA, aims to transform energy infrastructure, stabilize the power grid, and speed up the construction of new generation and data centers to support massive AI workloads. Chain Reaction will utilize Palantir's AIP and Ontology with NVIDIA's Nemotron models and CUDA-X libraries to streamline AI factory installations across the U.S.

feed.title: Palantir teams with Nvidia, CenterPoint Energy for software to speed up AI data center construction
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies, Nvidia, and CenterPoint Energy are collaborating to develop a new software platform called Chain Reaction. This platform aims to accelerate the construction of AI data centers by using AI tools to address challenges in permitting, supply chain, and construction. The initiative seeks to streamline complex supply chains and interdependencies among various partners involved in building these energy-intensive data centers.

feed.title: United Airlines Holdings Insider Sold Shares Worth $12,943,800, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at United Airlines Holdings sold shares totaling $12,943,800, as reported in a recent SEC filing. This news was published on December 4, 2025, at 04:27 am EST by MT Newswires.

feed.title: Buyout Giant KKR Signals Growing Ambition on Middle East Deals
feed.summary: Buyout firm KKR & Co. is demonstrating increased focus on the Middle East, evidenced by a large professional gathering in Abu Dhabi and the establishment of a third regional office there. These moves highlight the growing importance of the oil-rich Gulf region, which KKR views as a key center for global finance due to its young demographic, rising consumption, and strong economic growth. The $723 billion alternatives giant is capitalizing on the region's developing financial landscape.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton reports $1.67 trillion in assets under management By Investing.com
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton reported preliminary assets under management (AUM) of $1.67 trillion as of November 30, 2025, a slight decrease from the previous month but an increase year-over-year. The firm experienced flat long-term flows, with a $1 billion outflow from Western Asset Management offset by $1 billion in net inflows elsewhere. The company also recently exceeded analyst expectations for its fiscal Q4 2025 financial results.

feed.title: Bank of America Chair and CEO Brian Moynihan to Participate in the Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on December 10
feed.summary: Bank of America Chairman and CEO Brian Moynihan will participate in the Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on Wednesday, December 10, at 3:00 p.m. Eastern Time. A live webcast and replay of the event will be available on the Bank of America Investor Relations website. Bank of America is a leading financial institution serving various clients globally, offering a wide range of banking and financial services.

feed.title: Annandale Capital LLC Purchases New Position in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Annandale Capital LLC has acquired a new position in PepsiCo, Inc. by purchasing 17,898 shares valued at approximately $2.36 million during the second quarter. Other institutional investors like JSF Financial LLC, Dogwood Wealth Management LLC, Weaver Consulting Group, Joel Isaacson & Co. LLC, and Bull Street Advisors LLC have also adjusted their holdings in the company. PepsiCo's stock was down 0.4%, trading at $148.06, and the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.4225 per share.

feed.title: Baird Financial Group Inc. Decreases Holdings in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: Baird Financial Group Inc. reduced its stake in Procter & Gamble Company by 3.5% in the second quarter, selling 59,511 shares and retaining 1,642,493 shares valued at $261.68 million. Despite this decrease, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Kingstone Capital Partners Texas LLC significantly increased their holdings in PG. The article also details recent insider stock sales, Procter & Gamble's financial performance, dividend declaration, and updated analyst ratings.

feed.title: Dollar General Earnings on Deck – (NYSE:DG) Stock Eyeing Breakout
feed.summary: Dollar General (NYSE: DG) is poised to release its latest earnings report, with anticipation building for a potential stock breakout after a 10% rally over the past month. Analysts expect an EPS of $0.93 and revenue of $10.6 billion, despite past quarters showing mixed results with sales beating estimates but EPS missing. The company has undertaken strategic initiatives like store closures, conversions, and modernization projects, aiming to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency amidst ongoing margin pressures and a competitive retail landscape.

feed.title: Delivery Hero SE: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
feed.summary: This announcement from Delivery Hero SE reports a notification of major holdings by BlackRock, Inc., indicating an acquisition/disposal of shares with voting rights and instruments. BlackRock, Inc. now holds a total of 4.25% of voting rights in Delivery Hero SE, an increase from the previous notification of 3.999%. The notification also details the full chain of controlled undertakings within BlackRock, Inc. related to this holding.

feed.title: BD and INS Celebrate Nursing Excellence at the 13th Annual INS National Conference 2025
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) and the Infusion Nursing Society (INS) India successfully hosted their 13th Annual National Conference, gathering nursing leaders and healthcare innovators. The conference, themed 'Lines of Care, Lifelines of Change,' focused on advancing infusion practice and recognized excellence in the field. Key initiatives highlighted included the BD Mastermind Quiz and the new BD INSPIRE Quality Improvement Program, reflecting a shared commitment to improving patient safety and professional development.

feed.title: Align Technology Showcases Digital Dentistry Innovations at Greater New York Dental Meeting 2025
feed.summary: Align Technology highlighted its latest innovations in digital dentistry at the Greater New York Dental Meeting 2025, showcasing advancements across its Align™ Digital Platform. Key features included the iTero Lumina™ scanner, Align™ Oral Health Suite, Invisalign Smile Architect™, iTero™ Design Suite, and ClinCheck® Signature experience, alongside educational sessions from industry experts. The company emphasized how these innovations enhance treatment planning, practice workflows, and patient experiences for dental professionals.

feed.title: KLA Corp. price target raised to $1,214 from $1,154 at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for KLA Corp. (KLAC) stock to $1,214 from the previous $1,154. This adjustment suggests a positive outlook from the analytical firm regarding KLA Corp.'s future performance.

feed.title: Don Kornstein to retire from Board of Caesars Entertainment
feed.summary: Don Kornstein is retiring from the Board of Caesars Entertainment as vice chair, effective December 31, after 12 years of service across various Caesars entities. His departure will lead to a reduction in the Board's size to 11 members. Kornstein played a crucial role in the merger between Caesars and Eldorado, and company executives, including Tom Reeg and Gary Carano, expressed gratitude for his contributions.

feed.title: Eversource Energy declares quarterly dividend of $0.7525 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Eversource Energy announced a quarterly dividend of $0.7525 per share, payable on December 31, 2025. The company, which provides electricity, natural gas, and water services to 4.6 million customers, maintains its 2025 full-year non-GAAP earnings guidance despite the rejection of its Aquarion Water Company sale. This decision has led several financial institutions to lower their price targets and ratings for Eversource due to regulatory concerns.

feed.title: Latham & Watkins Advises Realty Income in US$800 Million Preferred Equity Investment in CityCenter Las Vegas
feed.summary: Latham & Watkins represented Realty Income in an US$800 million perpetual preferred equity investment in the real estate of CityCenter, Las Vegas, which includes the ARIA Resort & Casino and Vdara Hotel & Spa. The property's common equity ownership will remain with Blackstone Real Estate, and MGM Resorts International will continue its operation. This transaction marks Realty Income's second investment with Blackstone Real Estate, consistent with a previous successful joint venture.

feed.title: AI Helps C.H. Robinson Outdrive A Sluggish Freight Market
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson is leveraging its "Lean AI" platform to improve margins, outperform the market, and maintain dividend and buyback funding despite weak shipping demand. The logistics giant has shown strong capital efficiency and market share gains, leading to a positive outlook from Wall Street analysts. However, the company faces risks from cyclical demand, margin pressure, and competitive threats, with its future growth depending on continued AI implementation success and a rebound in freight volumes.

feed.title: Working capital per share of Cintas Corporation – MUN:CIT
feed.summary: This page provides financial data focused on the working capital per share for Cintas Corporation (MUN:CIT) listed on the Munich Stock Exchange. It offers a snapshot of this specific financial metric. The market status (closed) and the absence of trades are also noted.

feed.title: mAbxience and HP drive the use of artificial intelligence in biomanufacturing and biosimilar development
feed.summary: mAbxience and HP Inc. are partnering to develop an innovative AI solution that optimizes the production process of monoclonal antibodies and biosimilars. This project involves creating a digital twin of the biological process to enhance predictability, consistency, and efficiency in large-scale production, ultimately aiming to improve patient access to essential biologic therapies. The AI tool, developed using real production data and neural network models, allows mAbxience to simulate, analyze, and optimize cell culture manufacturing, with potential for global replication across their sites.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Stock: Is OTIS Outperforming the Industrial Sector?
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp (OTIS) is a global leader in elevator, escalator, and moving walkway manufacturing and servicing, with a market capitalization of $34 billion. Despite its strong industry position, OTIS stock has underperformed the Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLI) and the broader DOWI over the past three months and year-to-date. Wall Street analysts currently rate OTIS as "Hold" with a potential upside of 17.7% from current levels.

feed.title: Barclays Analyst is Bullish on AvalonBay Communities (AVB)
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Anthony Hau maintains an Overweight rating on AvalonBay Communities (AVB) with an unchanged price target of $190. Recent insider transactions show increased conviction from the President of the Mid-Atlantic and Chief Technology Officer, both purchasing shares. The article also details AVB's price performance against the S&P 500 and various financial metrics.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker Inc. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker Inc. (SWK) stock declined by 0.28% on Monday, closing at $84.34, while the S&P 500 gained 0.93%. This performance trailed its competitors, including Danaher Corp., Illinois Tool Works Inc., and Ingersoll Rand Inc., which all saw positive stock movements on the same day. Despite the daily underperformance, SWK has a year-to-date gain of 1.10%.

feed.title: Pentair Director Glenn T Michael Sells Shares

Following this transaction, Michael directly owns 31,192 common shares and 1,659 common stock-restricted stock units of Pentair plc. This insider transaction is detailed in an SEC Filing Form 4.

feed.title: Evaluating ConocoPhillips (COP) stock's actual performance
feed.summary: This article evaluates ConocoPhillips (COP) stock performance using Finbox's Dividend Discount Model (DDM). The analysis indicates that ConocoPhillips is undervalued by approximately 18% based on its intrinsic value of $143.08 per share, compared to its current share price of $116.59. The DDM suggests a strong future outlook for COP through its dividend growth and financial health.

feed.title: Broadridge's Distributed Ledger Repo Platform Processes $368 Billion in Average Daily Trade Volumes in November
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions' Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) platform processed an average of $368 billion in daily repo transactions in November 2025, a 466% increase year-over-year. This significant growth, totaling $7.4 trillion for the month, highlights the rapid adoption of tokenized settlement within capital markets. Broadridge emphasizes that tokenization is moving from concept to real-world transformation, creating new efficiencies, liquidity, and investor access by connecting traditional and digital financial ecosystems.

feed.title: McDonald's Corp Executive Sells Shares
feed.summary: Manuel Jm Steijaert, EVP - President, IOM of McDonald's Corp, sold 6,567 shares of common stock for a total of $2,006,218 at a weighted average price of $305.5 per share. This transaction took place on December 1, 2025. Following the sale, Steijaert directly owns 4,606 shares of McDonald's Corp.

feed.title: Broadridge's Distributed Ledger Repo Platform Processes $368 Billion in Average Daily Trade Volumes in November
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. announced its Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) platform processed an average of $368 billion in daily repo transactions in November 2025, totaling $7.4 trillion. This represents a 466% year-over-year increase, highlighting the rapid adoption of tokenized settlement in capital markets. The company emphasizes tokenization's role in creating a foundational shift towards greater efficiency, liquidity, and investor access.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton Sees 6% UK Yields, Warns of Budget Reckoning
authors: Laura Avetisyan and Sofia Horta e Costa
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton expects 30-year gilt yields in the UK to reach 6% in the coming year, driven by the government's struggle to fund spending. Despite Chancellor Rachel Reeves boosting the financial buffer in her recent budget, this was achieved through levies that will only take effect years from now, according to David Zahn, head of European fixed income at Franklin Templeton.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Explores Offloading Data Center Loan Risk
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is reportedly looking into offloading risks associated with its data center loans. This initiative comes amidst broader industry trends, as highlighted by an exclusive report that Microsoft is lowering AI software sales quotas due to customer resistance to newer products. The article, an exclusive briefing from The Information, indicates a potential shift in how financial institutions are managing their exposure to the rapidly evolving tech sector.

feed.title: Dir Brook Sells 2,080 ($192.1K) Of Newmont Corp [NEM]
feed.summary: Brook Bruce R, a Director of Newmont Corp (NEM), filed a Form 4 on December 3, 2025, disclosing the sale of 2,080 shares of Newmont Corp stock. The transaction, a planned sale executed on December 1, 2025, was valued at $192,109, with each share priced at $92.36. Following this sale, Brook Bruce R's direct holdings in Newmont Corp stand at 32,709 shares.

feed.title: Kimco Realty Corp To Go Ex-Dividend On December 5th, 2025 With 0.26 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Kimco Realty Corp (KIM.US) is scheduled to go ex-dividend on December 5th, 2025, with shareholders of record on that date receiving a 0.26 USD dividend per share on December 19th, 2025. The article also provides general definitions of cash dividends and stock dividends, along with important disclaimers regarding investment advice and dividend guarantees.

feed.title: Exxon to permanently shut one steam cracker in Singapore from March, sources say
feed.summary: ExxonMobil plans to permanently shut down one of its two steam crackers on Singapore's Jurong Island starting in March, with completion expected by June. This move is part of a broader trend in the global petrochemicals sector to reduce overcapacity, particularly as chemical producers face losses due to oversupply led by China. Following the shutdown, Exxon is considering purchasing feedstock to continue operating some of its derivative polyolefin units, although the long-term economic viability hinges on securing low olefin prices.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust To Go Ex-Dividend On December 17th, 2025 With 1.05 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust is scheduled to go ex-dividend on December 17th, 2025, with a dividend payment of $1.05 USD per share for shareholders of record on the same date. The dividend will be paid on January 16th, 2026. The article also provides general definitions of cash and stock dividends, along with disclaimers regarding investment and tax advice.

feed.title: Arista Networks director Giancarlo sells $1m in stock
feed.summary: Arista Networks director Charles H. Giancarlo sold 8,000 shares of common stock for approximately $1.02 million on December 1, 2025, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sales, Giancarlo retains a substantial indirect and direct ownership in the company. This news follows strong performance for Arista Networks, though its top-line growth is decelerating, leading to varied analyst ratings.

feed.title: 1925: Coca-Cola thanks Poplar Bluff for collaboration
feed.summary: This article revisits historical events coinciding with the date December 4th. The main focus is on 1925, where Coca-Cola thanked the residents of Poplar Bluff for their collaboration, highlighting the local bottling plant's importance. Additionally, it covers a 1950 attempted bakery bombing and a 1975 justifiable police shooting in Poplar Bluff.

feed.title: Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc (MAA.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $172
feed.summary: BofA Securities has maintained its Buy rating for Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc (MAA.US) and kept the target price at $172. Analyst Jana Galan, according to TipRanks, has a 46.4% success rate and a -0.5% average return over the past year. TipRanks provides independent analysis data for financial analysts, calculating success rates and average returns based on virtual portfolio performance.

feed.title: Everest announces key leadership appointments
feed.summary: Everest has announced strategic leadership appointments to enhance its global P&C operations and reinforce its commitment to underwriting excellence and innovation. Anne Broeker has been promoted to Senior Vice President, Head of International Casualty & Programs, while Connie Germano has been named Senior Vice President, Head of North America Casualty. These changes are effective immediately and are expected to drive growth and market-leading solutions.
